note: measured champions a fresh clone needs to run real campaigns; sha256 cross-checked against the campaigns' results.json records at upload time. Detection-head entries carry a 'wm' field naming the lock entry of the latent they were trained on — a head is only valid with its WM (planner/flight_mode.py --verify cross-checks the binding).

artifacts.name: world_model.pth
artifacts.what: the G1 world model (v0.2 champion; == world_model_g1.pth, cmp-verified)

artifacts.name: world_model_unified.pth
artifacts.what: unified WM (transit+indoor union) — WMPolicy transit + indoor detection; shipped ALONGSIDE the champion, never overwriting it (indoor_search flight mode)

artifacts.name: ppo_wm_policy_edge_hard_xp.zip
artifacts.what: the general champion policy (v0.3: hard worlds + odometry pin + edge diet)

artifacts.name: ppo_moving_gap_v2_K3.zip
artifacts.what: the moving-gap v2 champion (also threads the closing door zero-shot)

artifacts.name: target_head_yaw.pt
artifacts.what: indoor detection head on the frozen unified-WM latent, yaw-swept frames (AUC 0.982, obstacle-FA 0.021; yaw_v1) — the yaw spin-scan search head

artifacts.name: target_head_low.pt
artifacts.what: indoor detection head, multi-height + near-floor frames (0.4 m 0.66->0.90, z=0.15 m AUC 0.83; alt_v1) — the vertical/multi-altitude search head

artifacts.name: target_head_person.pt
artifacts.what: person detection head (AUC 0.918, shape-only probe 0.806; person_v1) — the find-a-person choreography head (find+return 0.933, n=15)
